creator: peterjeremy@acm.org
text:
If the SETI@home screensaver is not enabled (which is the default),
	the app_info.xml file (which is necessary to communicate with the
	boinc server) is not installed.

How-To-Repeat: 	Install astro/boinc-setiathome-enhanced without X11 screensaver
	and attempt to start boinc
